description: MCP server connecting Claude Code to GitHub for an issue to branch to PR to close workflow.
name: io.github.neturely/okffs

environmentVariables.description: GitHub PAT (fine-grained recommended). Falls back to `gh auth token` if unset.
environmentVariables.name: GITHUB_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Target repo owner. Auto-detected from the git origin remote if unset.
environmentVariables.name: GITHUB_OWNER

environmentVariables.description: Target repo name. Auto-detected from the git origin remote if unset.
environmentVariables.name: GITHUB_REPO

title: okffs
